sections_extracted.extracted_content_summary: HKDSE English Language Curriculum and Assessment Guide (Secondary 4-6), CDC/HKEAA, Education Bureau HKSARG, 2021, effective from Secondary 4 in the 2021/22 school year.
Three aims: increase language proficiency; develop knowledge, skills, values and attitudes; promote lifelong learning.
Subject knowledge and skills, generic skills, positive values and attitudes; organised under three Strands.
Interpersonal, Knowledge and Experience Strands with detailed learning targets.
Language Forms and Communicative Functions; Language Skills and Language Development Strategies; Attitudes Specific to English Language Learning.
Compulsory Part and Elective Parts; modules of learning and enrichment components.
Reading, Writing, Listening, Speaking assessment objectives.
Paper 1 Reading (20%, 1.5h), Paper 2 Writing (25%, 2h), Paper 3 Listening and Integrated Skills (30%, ~2h), Paper 4 Speaking (10%, ~20min), SBA (15%).
SBA reading/viewing programme, two to four texts, oral performance assessed.
Standards-referenced reporting, five levels, 5** and 5* annotations, SBA moderated.

sections_extracted.section: Appendix 1: Language Items and Communicative Functions
sections_extracted.extracted_content_summary: Communicative functions and language item examples for Key Stages 3-4.
Text type examples for Key Stages 1-4.

sections_extracted.section: Appendix 4: Language Skills and Language Development Strategies
sections_extracted.extracted_content_summary: Language skills and strategies for Key Stage 4.

sections_not_extracted.section: Appendix 5: Attitudes Specific to English Language Learning

split_recommendations.topics_json: Strands, learning targets and learning objectives from Chapter 2 (p.5-18).
split_recommendations.assessment_json: Aims, assessment objectives, paper structure, SBA, standards reporting from Chapter 5 (p.61-72).

known_risks: Single-channel text extraction; visual review of high-impact pages pending.
Large document (110 pages); appendix pages only partially audited.
Official URL and retrieved_at not captured in local archive metadata.
Live examination regulations and frameworks supersede the guide for exam-specific rules.
notes: Extraction completed without copying official PDF text. Page-map mappings use printed/footer page numbers.
